response.justification: Bogdan has strong distributed systems experience, deep full-stack expertise, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at Google — aligning well with the role’s technical and operational demands — but his resume contains significant red flags including a current role at Google starting in April 2025 (future-dated), inconsistent employment overlaps, and lack of clear evidence of AI-native engineering ownership or stakeholder leadership at scale, which are critical for a Staff-level IC.
strengths: Proven experience with distributed, high-throughput systems at Google and Meta
Hands-on exposure to AI-agent code generation frameworks (MCP) and developer tooling
Strong operational and full-stack background with ownership of complex systems
concerns: Current Google role listed as starting in April 2025 — impossible timeline
Overlapping employment dates suggest resume inflation or inaccuracies
Lacks explicit evidence of technical strategy leadership or agile scrum champion experience
